lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਪੜਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਬੂਝਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bed parreh har naam na boojheh |
lines.english: He may read the Vedas, but he does not realize the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਏਕੋ ਹੈ ਜਾਤਾ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਵੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh giaan eko hai jaataa anadin naam raveejai he |13|
lines.english: The Gurmukh knows the spiritual wisdom of the One Lord. Night and day, he chants the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਲੂਝਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa kaaran parr parr loojheh |
lines.english: For the sake of Maya, he reads and recites and argues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਅੰਧਾ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਤਰੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: antar mail agiaanee andhaa kiau kar dutar tareejai he |14|
lines.english: The ignorant and blind person is filled with filth within. How can he cross over the impassable world-ocean? ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁੰਨੁ ਪਾਪੁ ਸਭੁ ਬੇਦਿ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: pun paap sabh bed drirraaeaa guramukh amrit peejai he |15|
lines.english: The Vedas tell all about virtue and vice, but only the Gurmukh drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਅੰਤਰੁ ਭੀਜੈ ਨ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: n antar bheejai na sabad pachhaaneh |
lines.english: but his inner being is not saturated or satisfied, and he does not realize the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਬਾਦ ਸਭਿ ਆਖਿ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bed baad sabh aakh vakhaaneh |
lines.english: He voices all the controversies of the Vedas,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin doojaa avar na koee |
lines.english: There is no one else except Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਾਚਾ ਏਕੋ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aape saachaa eko soee |
lines.english: The One True Lord is all by Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਰਵੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate man saachaa sacho sach raveejai he |16|6|
lines.english: O Nanak, true is the mind of one who is attuned to the Naam; he speaks Truth, and nothing but Truth. ||16||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਚਾ ਤਖਤੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sachaa takhat rachaaeaa |
lines.english: The True Lord has established the Throne of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸਾਚੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sad hee saach vasiaa ghatt antar guramukh karanee saaree he |1|
lines.english: The True Lord dwells deep within the nucleus of the Gurmukh's heart forever; his actions are excellent. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਤਿਥੈ ਮੋਹੁ ਨ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nij ghar vasiaa tithai mohu na maaeaa |
lines.english: He dwells in His own home deep within the self, where there is no emotional attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਤਿਥੈ ਭਰਮੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਪਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: n tithai bharam na doojaa pasaaraa |
lines.english: There is no doubt within him, and no expanse of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਧਨੁ ਖਟਿਆ ਕਦੇ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sachaa dhan khattiaa kade tott na aavai boojhai ko veechaaree he |2|
lines.english: He has earned the true wealth, which is never exhausted. How few are those who contemplate this, and understand. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਉਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saudaa sach vaapaaraa |
lines.english: True is his merchandise, and true is his trade.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad sadaa gun gaaveh sabad rate veechaaree he |3|
lines.english: Through the True Word of the Shabad, they sing the True Praises of the Lord; they are attuned to contemplative meditation on the Shabad. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਵਡਭਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: antar sabad masatak vaddabhaage |
lines.english: The Word of the Shabad is deep within the nucleus of the self; good fortune is recorded upon their foreheads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਲਾਏ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: sachai laae se jan laage |
lines.english: They alone are attached to the True Name, whom the Lord Himself attaches.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੋ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: sacho sachaa sach saalaahee |
lines.english: I praise the True Lord, the Truest of the True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਵੇਖਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: eko vekhaa doojaa naahee |
lines.english: I see the One Lord, and no other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu sabad jalaaeaa |
lines.english: Emotional attachment to Maya is burnt away by the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਊਚੋ ਊਚੀ ਪਉੜੀ ਗਿਆਨਿ ਰਤਨਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guramat aoocho aoochee paurree giaan ratan haumai maaree he |4|
lines.english: The Guru's Teachings are the ladder to reach the highest of the high. the jewel of spiritual wisdom conquers egotism. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਸਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਕੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu sabh aape keenaa |
lines.english: All by Himself, God created emotional attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਕੀ ਸਭ ਸਚੀ ਕਰਣੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਤਿਖਾ ਨਿਵਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sache kee sabh sachee karanee haumai tikhaa nivaaree he |5|
lines.english: True are all the actions of the truthful; the thirst of egotism is subdued. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਜਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sach man vasiaa jaa tudh bhaaeaa |
lines.english: The True One comes to dwell in the mind, when it pleases You, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਕਿਨ ਹੀ ਚੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh viralai kin hee cheenaa |
lines.english: How rare are those who, as Gurmukh, realize the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਸਾਚੀ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su sach kamaavai saachee karanee saaree he |6|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh practices Truth; true and excellent are his actions. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਅੰਤਰੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: guramat sad hee antar seetal haumai maar nivaaree he |7|
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, he remains forever cool and calm deep within; he conquers and subdues his ego. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਈ ਜੋ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kaar kamaaee jo mere prabh bhaaee |
lines.english: He does those deeds which are pleasing to my God;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai trisanaa sabad bujhaaee |
lines.english: through the Shabad, he burns away egotism and the thirst of desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਲਗੇ ਤਿਨ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sach lage tin sabh kichh bhaavai |
lines.english: Those who are attached to the Truth are pleased with everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਸਾਚੇ ਸੇ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਨਦਰੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਸਵਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: aithai saache se dar saache nadaree nadar savaaree he |8|
lines.english: Those who are true in this world, are true in the Court of the Lord. The Merciful Lord adorns them with His Mercy. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਸਚਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sabade sach suhaavai |
lines.english: They are embellished with the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਚੇ ਜੋ ਦੂਜੈ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin saache jo doojai laaeaa |
lines.english: Those who are attached to duality, and not the Truth,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਦੁਖ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa moh dukh sabaaeaa |
lines.english: are trapped in emotional attachment to Maya; they totally suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਜਿਨਾ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa sabad jinaa man bhaaeaa |
lines.english: Those whose minds are pleased with the True Word of the Shabad

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਜਾਪੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਦੁਖੁ ਭਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: bin gur dukh sukh jaapai naahee maaeaa moh dukh bhaaree he |9|
lines.english: Without the Guru, they do not understand pain and pleasure; attached to Maya, they suffer in terrible pain. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨੀ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: poorab likhiaa tinee kamaaeaa |
lines.english: act according to pre-ordained destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੋ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: sacho seveh sach dhiaaveh sach rate veechaaree he |10|
lines.english: They serve the True Lord, and meditate on the True Lord; they are imbued with contemplative meditation on the True Lord. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਮੀਠੀ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee sevaa meetthee laagee |
lines.english: Service to the Guru seems sweet to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਸਮਾਧੀ ॥
lines.translit: anadin sookh sehaj samaadhee |
lines.english: Night and day, they are intuitively immersed in celestial peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਤਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ਪਿਆਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: har har karatiaa man niramal hoaa gur kee sev piaaree he |11|
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, their minds become immaculate; they love to serve the Guru. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸੁਖੀਏ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸਚੇ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: se jan sukhee satigur sache laae |
lines.english: Those humble beings are at peace, whom the True Guru attaches to the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਉਬਰੇ ਹੋਰ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਖੁਆਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: satigur raakhe se jan ubare hor maaeaa moh khuaaree he |12|
lines.english: Those humble beings, whom the True Guru protects, are saved. The rest are ruined through emotional attachment to Maya. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਭਾਣੇ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape bhaane aap milaae |
lines.english: He Himself, in His Will, merges them into Himself.
